description: Style Note German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This T-shirt from Puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This piece's crush-worthy colour and stylish cut is an off-duty must have. Pair this piece with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes. Product Details Black polo neck t-shirt with a spread collar, chest button placket, short sleeves, branding appliqued on the left chest, embroidered branding at the back of the neck, brand tab on the left hem and a vented hem  Material and Care 100% cotton  Machine wash cool water Do not bleach; dry clean Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M Style NoteGerman brand Puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity.
